name: Bonsai 1.7B
summary: Ultra-compressed 1-bit 1.7B model (248 MB). 14x smaller than FP16. Runs on virtually any device. Great for ultra-low storage or as a fast fallback.

name: Qwen3.5 0.8B
summary: Very small Qwen3.5 option for older phones and fast downloads. Good fallback when storage and memory are tight.

name: Bonsai 8B
summary: Ultra-compressed 1-bit 8B model (1.16 GB). 14x smaller than FP16 with competitive quality. Cross-platform including Android. Great when storage is tight but you need 8B-class reasoning.

name: Qwen3.5 2B Opus Distilled
summary: Distilled Qwen3.5 2B variant aimed at sharper Claude-style reasoning, coding help, and cleaner follow-through than the base 2B while staying phone-friendly.

name: Qwen3.5 2B
summary: Strong small-model upgrade over fallback tiers. This is a good default target for mainstream phones.

name: Hermes 3 Llama 3.2 3B
summary: Compact Hermes model with strong tool-calling and instruction following. Great for mobile devices. Supports structured function calling via ChatML.

name: Qwen3.5 4B Tuned
summary: Qwen3.5 4B variant tuned for more direct, less filtered replies than the base 4B while staying light enough for newer phones, tablets, and desktops.

name: Qwopus3.5 4B v3
summary: Reasoning-enhanced Qwen3.5 4B with act-then-refine agent workflows. Strong coding (HumanEval 75.6%) and tool-calling for its size.

name: Qwen3.5 4B
summary: Higher-quality Qwen3.5 option for newer phones. Likely one of the best mainstream chat models in the catalog.

name: Gemma 4 E2B IT
summary: Ultra-compact Gemma 4 with vision and 128K context. Google's smallest multimodal model — great for older phones and fast downloads.

name: DeepHermes 3 Llama 3 8B
summary: Hermes 8B with unified reasoning mode — toggle between fast responses and chain-of-thought thinking within a single model. Tool-calling included.

name: Hermes 3 Llama 3.1 8B
summary: Flagship Hermes 8B with excellent tool-calling, structured output, and multi-turn conversation. Strong all-rounder for phones and desktops.

name: Gemma 4 E4B IT
summary: Mid-range Gemma 4 with vision, 128K context, and strong multilingual support. Sweet spot for mainstream phones and tablets.

name: Gemma 4 E4B Tuned
summary: Gemma 4 E4B variant tuned for more direct, less filtered replies. Natively multimodal (text, image, video, audio) with 128K context.

name: Qwen3.5 9B Tuned
summary: Qwen3.5 9B variant tuned to feel friendlier, more direct, and less inquisitive in everyday chats. Heavy for phones and best suited to newer devices.

name: Qwen3.5 9B Opus Distilled
summary: Distilled Qwen3.5 9B variant aimed at stronger Claude-style reasoning, longer-form answers, and sharper coding help than the base 9B. Heavy for phones and a better fit for newer devices and desktops.

name: Qwopus3.5 9B v3
summary: Reasoning-enhanced Qwen3.5 9B with shorter, more stable reasoning paths. Outperforms base 9B on HumanEval (+4.87 pp) while using 25% fewer reasoning tokens.

name: Qwen3.5 9B Opus Distilled v2
summary: Improved v2 distillation of Qwen3.5 9B with 20% fewer reasoning tokens and higher accuracy. Good for offline analytical tasks, coding, and math.

name: Harmonic Hermes 9B
summary: Qwen3.5 9B fine-tune combining deep reasoning with Hermes-style tool calling and agent workflows. Vision-capable with 8K context.

name: Qwen3.5 9B
summary: Stretch goal model for flagship phones, tablets, and desktop-class devices. Expect heavier memory pressure and slower responses.

name: Qwen3.5 27B Opus Distilled
summary: Desktop-focused Qwen3.5 27B variant distilled toward Claude-style reasoning and longer-form responses. Best suited to Macs and PCs with substantial unified memory or RAM.

name: Qwen3.5 27B Tuned
summary: Desktop-focused Qwen3.5 27B variant tuned for more direct and less filtered responses than the base 27B. Best suited to Macs and PCs with substantial memory headroom.

name: Qwen3.5 27B Opus Distilled v2
summary: Improved v2 distillation of Qwen3.5 27B with ~24% shorter chain-of-thought and 31.6% more correct solutions per token. 96.91% HumanEval pass@1. Desktop only.

name: Qwopus3.5 27B v3
summary: Reasoning-enhanced Qwen3.5 27B with tool-calling RL and act-then-refine agentic workflows. 95.73% HumanEval Plus. Best for desktop setups with high memory.

name: Gemopus 4 26B-A4B
summary: Gemma 4 26B-A4B fine-tuned for higher answer quality with chain-of-thought reasoning. MoE with only 4B active params. Vision-capable. Desktop only.

name: Gemma 4 26B-A4B IT
summary: Mixture-of-Experts Gemma 4 with 25.2B total params but only 3.8B active per token. Flagship-quality vision and 256K context in a memory-efficient MoE package.

name: Gemma 4 26B-A4B Tuned
summary: Gemma 4 26B-A4B variant tuned for more direct replies. MoE architecture with only 4B active params. Vision support via dedicated mmproj.

name: Qwen3.5 27B
summary: Desktop-class Qwen3.5 model tuned for stronger reasoning and coding quality. Intended for higher-memory laptops and workstations.

name: GLM-4.7 Flash Opus Distilled
summary: Large desktop-focused GLM variant distilled toward stronger Claude-style reasoning and longer-form answers. Best suited to Macs and PCs with high memory budgets.

name: Gemma 4 31B IT
summary: Google's flagship Gemma 4 dense model. 30.7B params, 256K context, vision, and top-tier benchmarks (MMLU Pro 85.2%, AIME 89.2%). Desktop only.

name: Gemma 4 31B Tuned
summary: Gemma 4 31B variant tuned for more direct responses. Full dense 31B architecture for maximum quality. Desktop only.

name: Hermes 4.3 36B
summary: Latest flagship Hermes model based on ByteDance Seed 36B. 512K context window, best-in-class tool-calling, and strong reasoning. Desktop only.

name: Qwen3.5 35B-A3B
summary: Large Mixture-of-Experts Qwen3.5 option for high-end desktop setups where quality matters more than memory footprint.

name: Qwen3 Coder Next 80B-A3B
summary: MoE coding-specialist model with only 3B active parameters but 80B total. Excels at long-horizon reasoning, tool use, and agentic coding tasks. Desktop-only due to large memory footprint.

name: Qwen3.5 122B-A10B
summary: Ultra-large desktop MoE model for workstation-class hardware with very high memory capacity.

name: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super 120B-A12B
summary: High-end Nemotron MoE option for workstation-class Macs and PCs. Expect long downloads, long load times, and a very large memory footprint.

name: Qwen3.5 REAP 262B-A17B
summary: Pruned Qwen3.5-397B variant using REAP (Router-weighted Expert Activation Pruning) to cut 35% of MoE experts. Near-397B quality in a smaller footprint, fits on a single 96 GB GPU with CPU offload.

name: Qwen3.5 397B-A17B
summary: Maximum-scale Qwen3.5 desktop option for enterprise-grade hardware and very large memory headroom.
